meta.title: 历史文化对比
meta.description: Upper-intermediate historical and cultural comparison vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: civilization, tradition, and cultural exchange.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 역사문화 비교 어휘와 문형: 문명, 전통, 문화 교류.

questions.prompt: 「文明」是什么意思？(What does 文明 mean?)
「传统与现代」是什么意思？(What does 传统与现代 mean?)
「差异」是什么意思？(What does 差异 mean?)

explanation.ko: 「历史渊源」(lìshǐ yuānyuán)는 '역사적 연원, 뿌리'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「历史渊源」是什么意思？(What does 历史渊源 mean?)
「借鉴」是什么意思？(What does 借鉴 mean?)
古代中国是世界四大___之一，历史悠久。(Ancient China was one of the world's four great civilizations, with a long history.)
这个城市完美地融合了___的建筑风格。(This city perfectly blends the architectural styles of tradition and modernity.)
东西方文化在价值观上存在很大的___。(Eastern and Western cultures have great differences in values.)
这个节日有着深厚的___，可以追溯到几千年前。(This festival has profound historical roots, can be traced back thousands of years.)
我们应该___其他文明的先进经验，同时保留自己的特色。(We should draw on other civilizations' advanced experience, while preserving our own characteristics.)

explanation.en: 「尽管〜还是〜」means "although 〜, still 〜", though here better read as concessive contrast rather than "still"; still fits the pattern's grammatical form.

questions.prompt: 尽管文化背景不同，___人类对美好生活的追求是相通的。(Although cultural backgrounds differ, humanity's pursuit of a good life is universal.)
无论东方还是西方文明，___对人类历史产生了深远影响。(Whether Eastern or Western civilization, both have had a profound impact on human history.)
除非深入了解一个国家的历史，___很难真正理解其文化内涵。(Unless you deeply understand a country's history, it's hard to truly understand its cultural connotations.)
这两种文化之所以能够和谐共存，___是因为彼此都保持着开放包容的态度。(These two cultures can coexist harmoniously precisely because both maintain an open and tolerant attitude.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面我们要传承本国的传统文化，___方面也要吸收外来文化的精华。(On one hand we should pass on our own traditional culture, on the other hand we should also absorb the essence of foreign cultures.)
这两种文明在长期的交流中相互___，形成了独特的文化面貌。(These two civilizations influenced each other through long-term exchange, forming a unique cultural landscape.)
研究历史有助于我们更好地___当代社会问题。(Studying history helps us better understand contemporary social issues.)
这场文化交流活动加深了两国人民之间的相互___。(This cultural exchange activity deepened mutual understanding between the peoples of the two countries.)
这座古城___了丰富的历史文化遗产。(This ancient city preserves rich historical and cultural heritage.)
这本书___了东西方文化的异同，很有启发意义。(This book compares the similarities and differences between Eastern and Western cultures, very enlightening.)

explanation.en: 「之一」(one of) is a fixed pattern following the noun it modifies: 四大文明之一 (not 文明一之的, which scrambles the phrase).
explanation.ko: 「之一」는 수식하는 명사 뒤에 오는 고정 표현이므로 '四大文明之一'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 古代中国是世界四大文明一之的，历史悠久。(Ancient China was one of the world's four great civilizations.) — find the error
choices: 古代中国是世界四大文明之一，历史悠久。
古代中国是世界四大文明一之的，历史悠久。
古代中国是世界四大文明的之一，历史悠久。
古代中国是世界之一四大文明，历史悠久。

explanation.en: 「都」must come before 对 (toward/regarding): 都对 (not 对都).
explanation.ko: 「都」는 '对' 앞에 와야 하므로 '都对'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论东方还是西方文明，对都人类历史产生了深远影响。(Whether Eastern or Western civilization, both have had a profound impact on human history.) — find the error
choices: 无论东方还是西方文明，都对人类历史产生了深远影响。
无论东方还是西方文明，对都人类历史产生了深远影响。
无论东方还是西方文明，对人类历史都产生了深远影响。
无论东方还是西方文明，都产生了对人类历史深远影响。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这两种文化之所以能够和谐共存，因为是彼此都保持着开放包容的态度。(These two cultures can coexist harmoniously precisely because both maintain an open and tolerant attitude.) — find the error
choices: 这两种文化之所以能够和谐共存，是因为彼此都保持着开放包容的态度。
这两种文化之所以能够和谐共存，因为是彼此都保持着开放包容的态度。
这两种文化之所以能够和谐共存，是彼此因为都保持着开放包容的态度。
这两种文化之所以能够和谐共存，彼此是因为都保持着开放包容的态度。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 古代中国是世界四大文明之一，历史悠久 ("Ancient China was one of the world's four great civilizations, with a long history").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '古代中国是世界四大文明之一，历史悠久' (고대 중국은 세계 4대 문명 중 하나로 역사가 유구하다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 古代中国是__________，历史悠久。(Ancient China was one of the world's four great civilizations, with a long history.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 无论东方还是西方文明，都对人类历史产生了深远影响 ("Whether Eastern or Western civilization, both have had a profound impact on human history").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '无论东方还是西方文明，都对人类历史产生了深远影响' (동양이든 서양 문명이든 모두 인류 역사에 지대한 영향을 미쳤다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 无论东方还是西方文明，__________产生了深远影响。(Whether Eastern or Western civilization, both have had a profound impact on human history.)
